message:
Add LLM data model types and provider adapter interface

Message, ContentPart, Role, ToolDefinition, ToolCall, Request, Response,
Usage (with addition), FinishReason, StreamEvent, ProviderAdapter interface.
Msg convenience constructors and messageText/messageToolCalls helpers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
